mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO stock_moneyflow (ts_code, trade_date, buy_sm_amount, sell_sm_amount, buy_sm_vol, sell_sm_vol, buy_md_amount, sell_md_amount, buy_md_vol, sell_md_vol, buy_lg_amount, sell_lg_amount, buy_lg_vol, sell_lg_vol, buy_elg_amount, sell_elg_amount, buy_elg_vol, sell_elg_vol, net_mf_amount, net_mf_vol) VALUES
(#{i.tsCode}, #{i.tradeDate}, #{i.buySmAmount}, #{i.sellSmAmount}, #{i.buySmVol}, #{i.sellSmVol}, #{i.buyMdAmount}, #{i.sellMdAmount}, #{i.buyMdVol}, #{i.sellMdVol}, #{i.buyLgAmount}, #{i.sellLgAmount}, #{i.buyLgVol}, #{i.sellLgVol}, #{i.buyElgAmount}, #{i.sellElgAmount}, #{i.buyElgVol}, #{i.sellElgVol}, #{i.netMfAmount}, #{i.netMfVol})
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM stock_moneyflow WHERE
(ts_code = #{i.tsCode} AND trade_date = #{i.tradeDate})
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM stock_moneyflow WHERE trade_date = #{tradeDate} ORDER BY
net_mf_amount net_mf_vol net_mf_amount
ASC DESC
LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stock_moneyflow WHERE trade_date >= #{startDate} AND ABS(net_mf_amount - (buy_lg_amount + buy_elg_amount - sell_lg_amount - sell_elg_amount)) / NULLIF(ABS(net_mf_amount), 0) > 0.1
